transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, am I speaking with Deepa Krishnan?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello? Hello? Yes. These days, we can't arrange any money.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Deepa. Your account currently shows fifty thousand rupees pending on your DemoLender loan. I need to check with the team on the best closure offer for you, but I do want to help you sort this out. Can you tell me a little about what's been going on?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So So yeah, sir. Yes, sir. I I can pay it on

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can pay it on when, Deepa? What date were you thinking?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: hello? No. No. No. I can pay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's great to hear. When would you be able to make the payment, Deepa?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello? Can you sell can you please listen to me this once?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, Deepa. I'm listening. Go ahead.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello? Yeah. I I'll pay it on

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You'll pay it on — what date, Deepa? I didn't catch that.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I'll pay it on April 1. Sir. April 1. Hello?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: April 1st, noted. I'll schedule that and get back to you with the exact figures once I confirm with the team.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, sir. I just do I just do I just pay the

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You just pay the — what, Deepa? Take your time, I'm listening.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: amount, sir. Like, not not with extra amount, like, charges charges amount. I'll pay from April 1. Everything every year, I'll pay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Deepa — you want to pay without the extra charges, starting April 1st. Let me check with the team and confirm the exact amount you'd need to pay. I'll call you back with those figures. I'll have everything ready when I call you back. Thank you for your time, Deepa. Take care. Thank you, Deepa. We'll be in touch with the exact figures. Have a good day.

function_calls.params: preferred_time="April 1", callback_type="wants_payment_amount", reason="Borrower willing to pay principal without charges from April 1. Needs confirmed closure amount."
